quote_section.quote: Furniture is more than wood and metal—it's the heart of a home, the silent witness to life's moments.

story_section.title: Our Story
story_section.subtitle: From Humble Beginnings to Global Reach
story_section.description_paragraph1: Since 2017, Monteri has been operating in various fields of the furniture industry, with a strong focus on design, quality, and global impact.
story_section.description_paragraph2: As of 2025, we have shifted our focus to innovative coffee table designs, offering products that bring both aesthetics and functionality to living spaces. Committed to delivering maximum quality and customer satisfaction at every stage, our production takes place in our facility located in İnegöl, Bursa, in accordance with international standards.
story_section.description_paragraph3: At Monteri, we are dedicated to creating inspiring interiors through our original designs, moving forward with the vision of becoming a trend-setting brand in the world of furniture.

mission_section.title: Our Mission
mission_section.mission_statement: At Monteri, our mission is to create furniture that inspires and endures. We believe in the power of thoughtful design, the beauty of natural materials, and the importance of craftsmanship.

quality.description: We use only the finest materials and meticulous craftsmanship to ensure every piece meets our high standards.

testimonials_section.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials_section.subtitle: Real stories from satisfied customers around the world
testimonials_section.feedback1: The coffee tables I bought from Monteri are both very stylish and incredibly functional. They became the centerpiece of my dining room!
testimonials_section.feedback2: I was looking for a different coffee table, and this design exceeded all my expectations. The craftsmanship is excellent!
testimonials_section.feedback3: I recently bought a side table, and it fits perfectly in my living room. Both sturdy and very stylish!
testimonials_section.feedback4: The serving trolley is both elegant and practical. It serves as a stylish centerpiece and is highly functional.
testimonials_section.feedback5: I was impressed by the material quality used in the coffee table set. It’s clear that Monteri values craftsmanship.
testimonials_section.feedback6: The side tables are a real conversation starter! They add a unique touch to my home decor and are very well made.
